content.hint: Think about the standard format for professional expense submissions — file type and clear naming are required.
content.situation: An employee is preparing to upload expense receipts and wants to confirm the correct file format and naming convention.
content.speakerText: Should I upload the receipts as photos or scanned files? How should I name them?
content.speakerTextCn: 我应该上传照片还是扫描文件？文件名该怎么命名？
content.knowledgePoint: 文件格式与命名规范表达
content.responseTemplate: Only ___ files are accepted, and please name them like '___'.

content.hint: Remember the policy: missing receipts mean the entire claim may be rejected unless an exception applies.
content.situation: An employee lost one receipt and asks if they can still submit the claim with only some documents.
content.speakerText: I couldn't find one receipt. Can I still submit the rest?
content.speakerTextCn: 我找不到一张发票了，还能提交其他的吗？
content.responseTemplate: I'm sorry, but claims require all receipts — ___ is not allowed.

content.hint: Recall the rule: blurry or unprofessional images are rejected — scanning ensures clarity.
content.situation: A new employee is unsure whether they need to scan receipts or if clear photos are acceptable.
content.speakerText: Can I just take a picture with my phone and upload it?
content.speakerTextCn: 我能不能直接用手机拍张照上传？
content.knowledgePoint: 禁止使用手机原图的表达
content.responseTemplate: No, ___ from your phone camera aren't accepted — please scan them instead.

content.scenarioHint: 员工在上传发票前，想确认是否可以提交模糊或不清晰的扫描件
content.responseTemplate: Can I upload ___ instead of a clear scan?
content.hint: 考虑哪种形式不符合公司对发票清晰度的要求
content.knowledgePoint: 询问文件格式与质量要求

content.scenarioHint: 员工想确认是否可以将多张发票合并成一个文件上传
content.responseTemplate: Can I combine multiple receipts into ___?
content.hint: 考虑哪种文件格式是公司允许的合并方式
content.knowledgePoint: 询问文件合并与格式规范
